languages.text: Труп агента Инквизиции, разорван на куски кем-то большим

traits.locale_text: Труп агента Инквизиции, разорван на куски кем-то большим

languages.text: Тело рассечено пополам по линии талии. Разрез идеально ровный — словно клинок, оставивший его, прошел насквозь, не встречая даже малейшего сопротивления.
The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.
languages.original_text: Тело рассечено пополам по линии талии. Разрез идеально ровный — словно клинок, оставивший его, прошел насквозь, не встречая даже малейшего сопротивления.

traits.locale_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

languages.text: Der Körper wurde an der Hüfte durchtrennt. Der Schnitt ist enervierend sauber, als hätte die Klinge keinerlei Widerstand gehabt.
languages.original_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

traits.locale_text: Der Körper wurde an der Hüfte durchtrennt. Der Schnitt ist enervierend sauber, als hätte die Klinge keinerlei Widerstand gehabt.

languages.text: Le corps est tranché en deux au niveau de la taille. La coupure est étonnamment nette, comme si la lame n'avait pas rencontré la moindre résistance.
languages.original_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

traits.locale_text: Le corps est tranché en deux au niveau de la taille. La coupure est étonnamment nette, comme si la lame n'avait pas rencontré la moindre résistance.

languages.text: El cadáver está diseccionado por la cintura. El corte es tan limpio que resulta inquietante, como si la hoja lo hubiera atravesado sin la menor resistencia.
languages.original_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

traits.locale_text: El cadáver está diseccionado por la cintura. El corte es tan limpio que resulta inquietante, como si la hoja lo hubiera atravesado sin la menor resistencia.

languages.text: Ceset, belinden ikiye bölünmüş. Kesik, sanki bıçak en ufak bir direnişle karşılaşmadan içinden geçip gitmiş gibi sinir bozucu derecede pürüzsüz.
languages.original_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

traits.locale_text: Ceset, belinden ikiye bölünmüş. Kesik, sanki bıçak en ufak bir direnişle karşılaşmadan içinden geçip gitmiş gibi sinir bozucu derecede pürüzsüz.

languages.text: 尸首自腰部被一分为二，切口异常平整，仿佛刀刃穿过时未遇丝毫阻碍。
languages.original_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

traits.locale_text: 尸首自腰部被一分为二，切口异常平整，仿佛刀刃穿过时未遇丝毫阻碍。

languages.text: 胴体を二分した斬り。抵抗なく刃が通ったかのような、恐ろしいほど綺麗な切り口。
languages.original_text: The corpse is bisected at the waist. The cut is unnervingly clean, as though the blade passed through without the slightest resistance.

traits.locale_text: 胴体を二分した斬り。抵抗なく刃が通ったかのような、恐ろしいほど綺麗な切り口。
